overview: Functional medicine practice led by Dr. Gloria Hamada that identifies root causes of health concerns through extensive case history, lab review, and functional testing, offering personalized wellness plans incorporating nutritional, dietary, and lifestyle recommendations.
highlights: Functional medicine certified practitioner with 30+ years clinical experience
Virtual consultations with 60-90 minute initial case review
Specialized functional lab testing including food intolerance, digestive function, and genomic analysis
targetAudience: Patients seeking root-cause treatment for digestive issues, autoimmune diseases, food sensitivities, and general wellness optimization.
